query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%time%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%date%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%creat%')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%time%' OR (TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%date%') OR (TABLE_NAME = 'puzzle_attempts' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%creat%')
